experiments.paper_title: Neurosymbolic Association Rule Mining from Tabular Data
experiments.training_setup: Aerial+ leverages an under-complete autoencoder to create a neural representation of the data, capturing associations between features. It extracts rules from this neural representation by exploiting the model's reconstruction mechanism.
metrics: concise, high-quality rule sets with full data coverage
experiments.key_results: Aerial+ achieves state-of-the-art results by learning more concise, high-quality rule sets with full data coverage. When integrated into rule-based interpretable machine learning models, Aerial+ significantly reduces execution time while maintaining or improving accuracy.

experiments.paper_title: A dissemination workshop for introducing young Italian students to NLP
experiments.training_setup: A laboratory run at several Italian science festivals.
experiments.key_results: Game-based material was developed and made available for popularizing NLP among young students.

experiments.training_setup: Empirical evaluation of learning from data and knowledge.
metrics: correspondence between logical reasoning and energy minimization
experiments.key_results: Empirical evaluation of the correspondence between logical reasoning and energy minimization using Restricted Boltzmann Machines (RBM) was conducted. Learning from data and knowledge was evaluated empirically and compared with symbolic, neural, and neurosymbolic systems.

experiments.paper_title: Teaching NLP with Bracelets and Restaurant Menus: An Interactive Workshop for Italian Students
experiments.training_setup: The workshop was presented at numerous outlets in Italy between 2019 and 2021, both face-to-face and online, to high school Italian students aged between 13 and 18 years.
experiments.key_results: An interactive workshop was developed to illustrate the basic principles of NLP and computational linguistics to high school Italian students.

experiments.paper_title: Enhancing Large Language Models with Neurosymbolic Reasoning for Multilingual Tasks
experiments.training_setup: During inference, NSAR explicitly extracts symbolic facts from text and generates executable Python code to handle complex reasoning steps.
metrics: accuracy in identifying and synthesizing multiple pieces of information
experiments.ablation_studies: Extensive experiments across seven languages and diverse context lengths.
experiments.key_results: NSAR significantly outperforms both a vanilla RAG baseline and advanced prompting strategies in accurately identifying and synthesizing multiple pieces of information.

experiments.paper_title: Intermediate Languages Matter: Formal Languages and LLMs affect Neurosymbolic Reasoning
experiments.training_setup: LLMs are used as translators from natural to formal languages and symbolic solvers are used for deriving correct results.
experiments.ablation_studies: Comparing four formal languages across three datasets and seven LLMs.
experiments.key_results: The choice of formal language affects both syntactic and semantic reasoning capabilities. Varying effects across different LLMs were also discussed.

experiments.paper_title: Towards a Neurosymbolic Reasoning System Grounded in Schematic Representations
experiments.training_setup: The system operationalizes the spatial foundations of cognitive structures using declarative spatial reasoning within Answer Set Programming.
metrics: effective logical reasoning with enhanced interpretability
experiments.key_results: LLMs can be guided to interpret scenarios through embodied cognitive structures, these structures can be formalized as executable programs, and the resulting representations support effective logical reasoning with enhanced interpretability.

experiments.paper_title: Sound and Complete Neurosymbolic Reasoning with LLM-Grounded Interpretations
datasets: datasets created from several short-form factuality benchmarks
experiments.training_setup: An LLM is directly integrated into the interpretation function of the formal semantics for a paraconsistent logic.
experiments.key_results: Experimental evidence for the feasibility of the method was provided by evaluating the function using datasets created from several short-form factuality benchmarks.

experiments.paper_title: Guaranteed Conformance of Neurosymbolic Models to Natural Constraints
experiments.training_setup: The dataset is distilled into representative samples called memories using a growing neural gas. These memories are used to partition the state space into disjoint subsets, and bounds are computed for the neural network in each subset.
experiments.key_results: On three case studies (Car Model, Drones, and Artificial Pancreas), constrained neurosymbolic models conform to specified models with order-of-magnitude improvements compared to augmented Lagrangian and vanilla training methods.

experiments.paper_title: GR-NLP-TOOLKIT: An Open-Source NLP Toolkit for Modern Greek
metrics: state-of-the-art performance in named entity recognition
experiments.key_results: GR-NLP-TOOLKIT provides state-of-the-art performance in five core NLP tasks for modern Greek (part-of-speech tagging, morphological tagging, dependency parsing, named entity recognition, and Greeklishto-Greek transliteration).
